title: 3-in-1 Toy Car Storage Box: 20 Cars Included, Car Garage Toy with Play Mat & Parking Garage - Foldable & Portable Kids Toy Library
features: Toy Car Garage Box: This toy car garage box is designed for storage and play. It includes 20 cars, making it a complete set for hours of fun! This box helps you store toys easily to keep away from messy. Great for school education, presents, and fun play!

Multi-Functional toy car storage & Play Area: When unfolded, the lid turns into a fun parking lot that doubles as a play area. With the included 20 cars, kids have the perfect place to race their cars and park them in the built-in parking garage. This versatile design offers endless opportunities for both play and storage, all in one compact, easy-to-use box.

Foldable & Travel-Friendly – This car play mat easily folds for compact storage and travel. Whether at home or on the go, kids can take their toy garage anywhere with ease. Lightweight design with handles for effortless carrying.
Easy to Assemble & Convert – Designed with magic tape for effortless transformation from a car mat for children to a structured toy garage in just 4 simple steps. No complicated setup needed!
Interesting Play Place: Our toy car garage box not only can meet your various storage needs but also can provide your little one a magic space to play on.
description: Product description Ideals for School Education, Gifts, and Fun Play ! Durable toy car storage box not only can meet your long term storage need, but also can help to teach your children to clean up the messy playroom. Sturdy & durable Two handles for carrying it around Play, fun and organization combined In a matter of seconds, this innovative box transforms into a thrilling garage playset, complete with a 2-level parking lot area and a ramp for high-speed action and Includes 20 Cars. Directions Instructions for transforming and using the toy garage are provided.
